meaning: n.昆虫,六脚的节足动物adj.六脚的
examples: A rudder servo controller for hexapod robot platform is designed.
Disintegrator - This will give your Eradicator Hexapod a close range anti-vehicle weapon.
Similar to the Redeemer, the Hexapod can both deal and absorb a significant amount of damage.
Project Hexapod will even post a video of the destruction on YouTube for the world to enjoy.
Based at the Artisan Asylum in Somerville, Project Hexapod is led by James Whong, Dan Cody, and Gui Cavalcanti.
